intro: Aspidium opacum, also known as the Opacum fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
